stouffer_projection.assumption: Each system provides identical-precision Exact family-sign-flip test blind

alpha_inference_projection.method: Inverse-variance weighted alpha across independent systems
alpha_inference_projection.assumption: Each system provides independent alpha inference with same precision as Refsdal

binomial_cross_system.method: Binomial sign test across independent systems
binomial_cross_system.assumption: Each system yields a positive or negative residual under GR null

prospective_thresholds.note: These thresholds assume each new system provides an independent blind-prediction residual test with precision equivalent to SN Refsdal (blind model uncertainty sigma_model ~ 16-60 d, 6 blind models, R_tep ~ 14.5 d). Degraded precision in new systems increases the required N proportionally. These thresholds are designated prospectively for future systems and should not be adjusted post-measurement.
